MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly Chu, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Finas Belk, et al.
No other appearances.

RULING:
Defendant Goodrich Corporation's motion for summary judgment. No argument was made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is denied. Defendant fails to sustain its burden of production. Defendant fails to present admissible affirmative evidence negating an element of the plaintiff's cause of action. Defendant also fails to present evidence demonstrating that the plaintiff does not have and cannot obtain needed evidence. Plaintiff's objections to the McCrillis affidavit are sustained. Mr. McCrillis fails to provide sufficient foundation for his statements. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077
